001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.R;
004
005/**
006 * Enumeration of available tools in the game. Each tool has a display name and associated icon
007 * resource.
008 */
009public enum ToolType {
010  /** Scan tool for revealing fossil locations and automatically digging or extracting them. */
011  SCAN("Scan", R.drawable.radar_sweep),
012  /** Extract tool for carefully removing fossils without destroying them. */
013  EXTRACT("Extract", R.drawable.large_paint_brush),
014  /** Dig tool for clearing squares (destroys fossils). */
015  DIG("Dig", R.drawable.dig_dug),
016  /** Fence tool for marking suspected fossil locations. */
017  FENCE("Fence", R.drawable.packed_planks),
018  /** Move tool for safe navigation. */
019  MOVE("Move", R.drawable.tread);
020
021  private final String toolName;
022  private final int imageId;
023
024  /**
025   * Constructs a ToolType with the specified name and image resource.
026   *
027   * @param toolName Display name of the tool.
028   * @param imageId Drawable resource ID for the tool icon.
029   */
030  ToolType(String toolName, int imageId) {
031    this.toolName = toolName;
032    this.imageId = imageId;
033  }
034
035  /**
036   * Gets the display name of this tool.
037   *
038   * @return Tool name.
039   */
040  public String getToolName() {
041    return toolName;
042  }
043
044  /**
045   * Gets the drawable resource ID for this tool's icon.
046   *
047   * @return Image resource ID.
048   */
049  public int getImageId() {
050    return imageId;
051  }
052}
